Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

CalibrationNumberSupplierNumber.ITGHardwareNumber.LowerPartSoftwareNumberPartNumber.LowerPartEditionNumberDiagnosticIdentificationCodePartNumber.BasicPartListHardwareNumber.BasicPartListApprovalNumber.BasicPartListManufacturerIdentificationCode
ReadDTC I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 17FF00
Reply Bytes 5700
Data Items
NDTCFirstDTCHistorical FailureCurrent FailureStandard Fault
OutputControl I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 30010001
Reply Bytes 700000
Data Items
OutputControlStatus

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.
